rationale: Replace duplicated validation/error-wrapping code with delegation to the shared withValidatedCoords function.
implementation: Delegates to withValidatedCoords with a callback that calls fetchWeather and returns the JSON. The error label preserves the original 500 message for distinguishable logs.
